overall.description: First-person perspective walking along a narrow dirt trail through dense forest at night, illuminated by a flashlight. The footage appears to be from a survival horror video game, with the player moving steadily forward through tall grass toward a distant orange glow visible through the trees ahead.

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person walk along a narrow dirt trail through a dark forest at night. The path is flanked by tall grass on the left and a grassy slope on the right, with tree silhouettes visible against the dark sky. Around the 4-second mark, a distant orange glow becomes visible through the trees ahead, suggesting a light source or fire in the distance.

agents.ego_description: continuing to walk forward along the trail, maintaining steady pace toward the distant glow

segments.scene_description: The walk continues through the same narrow forest trail, with the dirt path and grassy banks remaining consistent. The distant orange glow stays visible ahead, though the surrounding tree silhouettes shift as the camera moves forward. The environment remains dark and enclosed, with the flashlight providing the primary illumination on the path ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a dark, oppressive forest that gradually reveals a mysterious light source in the distance. It begins with a steady walk along a narrow dirt trail, flanked by tall grass and a sloping bank under a pitch-black sky. As the camera pushes forward, the silhouettes of towering trees shift and recede, while a faint orange glow emerges through the dense foliage ahead. The scene then maintains this forward momentum, with the flashlight cutting through the gloom to illuminate the path as the distant fire-like light becomes a constant focal point. Finally, the environment remains enclosed and shadowy, drawing the viewer deeper into the woods toward the flickering warmth of the distant glow.
